waves.description: Foundation modules with no inter-module dependencies

assignments.name: environment
assignments.specialist_description: Creates the 3D world: floating island platforms with Rapier static bodies, sky, fog, and provides getTerrainHeight/islandPositions to ctx for other modules.

assignments.name: network
assignments.specialist_description: Manages WebSocket connection to the relay server. Provides send(), onMessage(), getSessionId() API. Falls back to singleplayer mode if server is unavailable.

assignments.name: ui
assignments.specialist_description: Builds the DOM-based HUD overlay: score counter, player list, connection status, win screen. Reacts to eventBus events only — has no knowledge of 3D scene.

waves.description: Modules that depend on Wave A outputs

assignments.name: player
assignments.specialist_description: Player capsule with Rapier dynamic body, WASD+Space controls, third-person camera, respawn on fall. Syncs position over network and renders remote players.

assignments.name: gameplay
assignments.specialist_description: Spawns coins on islands, handles proximity-based collection, tracks per-player scores, checks win condition (10 coins), syncs coin state via network.
